name: Plain Muffins I
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and mix with baking powder and salt.
2. Beat the egg, shortening, milk, and sugar in a separate bowl.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Grease muffin tins and fill each cavity about 2/3 full.
5. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 15-20 minutes.
6. Serve 10 portions.
